transcript: Customer: Hi, this is Priya Raman. I have a technician scheduled for this afternoon and I just want to check whether they're still on track to make it. Dispatcher: Let me look that up for you, Priya. Customer: Thanks, I just need to know the status of my appointment so I can plan around it. I don't need to change anything.

expected_entities.request: Status of an existing afternoon appointment
expected_entities.intent_note: Read-only status lookup, no changes requested
